examples: OK, is that OK now? Did I misspell other words?
This is not just bad spelling, but a deliberate attempt to creatively misspell words.
When I misspell something, when I go on to Google, my shy, it will say, "Did you mean that..."
You misspell British Airways, and British Airways ends up paying a toll to Google to get users to visit their site who wanted to go there anyway.
